data.title: Tesla CEO Elon Musk To Campaign For Trump In Pennsylvania, Asks Attendees To Support Free Speech: 'There's No Attendance Fee'
data.description: Billionaire Elon Musk said on Tuesday that he would give "a series of talks" through Pennsylvania starting from Wednesday night through Monday, as part of his campaigning for Republican presidential candidate Donald Trump.

data.title: ASML Struggles In Wednesday Pre-Market As Nvidia, AMD And Other Peers Begin Recovery From Chipmaker's Downward Pull
data.description: ASML's CEO mentioned a gradual recovery and cautious customer sentiment, while CFO Roger Dassen projected China's contribution to ASML's revenue to normalize at 20% next year, down from 49% in the June quarter.

data.title: Texas Gets A Lift: Embraer's ~$70M Investment Set To Power Aviation Jobs And Innovation In Fort Worth
data.description: Embraer expands MRO services in US with new center, investing $70 million & creating 250 jobs, strengthening Texas' role in aerospace innovation.

data.title: Why Is J.B. Hunt Stock Surging Premarket On Wednesday?
data.description: J.B. Hunt Transport Services reported Q3 2024 results, with revenue beating expectations but operating income and load volumes declining.

data.title: Enerpac Misses Q4 EPS Expectations, Warns Of Industrial Slowdown In FY25
data.description: Enerpac Tool Group shares down after reporting worse-than-expected Q4 EPS results and providing lower-than-expected FY25 guidance.
